sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Community voice: TVA’s new leadership is a win for farmers like me
feed.summary: A lifelong farmer in the Tennessee Valley, Alex Forsbach, expresses confidence in the Tennessee Valley Authority's (TVA) new leadership. He believes their focus on American energy, job creation, and a strong economy aligns with the needs of farmers, moving away from policies that prioritized "green energy" over reliable infrastructure like coal, nuclear, and natural gas. Forsbach highlights TVA's historical support for agriculture, including conservation efforts and disaster recovery, asserting that the new direction will ensure long-term prosperity for the region's rural communities.

feed.title: News | CVS Health May Have Violated Antitrust Laws, Finds House Judiciary Committee Report
feed.summary: A House Judiciary Committee report suggests that CVS Health may have violated antitrust laws by stifling competition and innovation in the digital pharmacy sector. The report, titled "When CVS Writes the Rules: How CVS Protects Itself From Innovation and Competition," claims CVS prevented independent pharmacies from working with competing "hub" pharmacies after surveilling them. CVS Health denies these allegations, calling the report "misguided, misleading and inaccurate," and states its actions are aimed at preventing fraud, waste, and abuse in the pharmaceutical supply chain.

feed.title: Honeywell settles Flexjet engine maintenance dispute after warning of $470m hit
feed.summary: Honeywell has reached a settlement with fractional aircraft ownership firm Flexjet, ending a lawsuit over engine maintenance that Honeywell had warned could cost it $470 million. The agreement also extends their existing engine maintenance contract through 2035 and resolves related litigation with Duncan Aviation and StandardAero. Flexjet's 2023 lawsuit alleged Honeywell failed to meet requirements of their 2019 service agreement for HTF7000-series turbofans, with Honeywell attributing issues to supply chain and geopolitical factors.

feed.title: Truist Financial’s Earnings Call Maps Path to Higher Returns
feed.summary: Truist Financial (TFC) reported profitable Q4 and full-year 2025 results, demonstrating broad-based loan growth, improving net interest margin, and stable credit trends despite one-off legal and severance charges. The company emphasized its path to higher returns, including a new $10 billion share repurchase authorization and a target of 15% return on tangible common equity by 2027. Management highlighted digital banking momentum, disciplined expense control, and robust capital despite a slight dip in the CET1 ratio.

feed.title: Honeywell (HON) Settles Litigation with Flexjet, Extends Engine Maintenance Agreement to 2035
feed.summary: Honeywell (HON) has settled its litigation with Flexjet, extending their engine maintenance agreement through 2035. This resolution eliminates legal risks and restores their partnership, following Flexjet's 2023 lawsuit accusing Honeywell of breaching their maintenance agreement due to delayed repairs. While specific financial terms were not disclosed, Honeywell previously indicated a comprehensive settlement could involve significant one-time cash payments and impact Q4 sales and operating income.

feed.title: Crown Castle (CCI) Announces Year-End Tax Reporting for 2025 Distributions
feed.summary: Crown Castle (CCI) announced its year-end tax reporting for 2025 distributions, totaling $4.69 per share, including an ordinary taxable dividend of $3.13. The company, which operates approximately 40,000 cell towers and 90,000 route miles of fiber, paid dividends quarterly throughout 2025. Wall Street analysts predict a rise in CCI's stock price over the next 12 months, with an average target of $107.78, despite some recent downgrades in price targets from firms like KeyBanc, UBS, and Goldman Sachs.

feed.title: KeyBanc raises Applied Materials (AMAT) target to $380, keeps overweight rating
feed.summary: KeyBanc has increased its price target for Applied Materials (AMAT) to $380, up from the previous target of $275. The firm maintained an Overweight rating on the stock, indicating continued confidence in the company's performance and future outlook.

feed.title: PACCAR (NASDAQ:PCAR) Sets New 1-Year High After Dividend Announcement
feed.summary: PACCAR (NASDAQ:PCAR) shares reached a new 52-week high following the announcement of a quarterly dividend of $0.33 per share. The company, which has a consensus analyst rating of "Hold" and an average price target below its current trading price, also reported Q earnings that slightly missed estimates but revenue that exceeded expectations. Institutional investors and hedge funds hold a significant portion of its stock.

feed.title: Is Sempra's (SRE) Legal Leadership Shift Hinting At A Deeper Regulatory Strategy Recalibration?
feed.summary: Sempra announced a leadership change, with David J. Barrett moving to a litigation and regulatory role, ahead of an anticipated fiscal fourth-quarter profit decline. This shift is viewed as a fine-tuning of risk management rather than a major strategic change, particularly given Sempra's identity as a stable, regulated utility nearing its fair value. The article suggests focusing on potential regulatory and financing risks, as well as the upcoming earnings report, for more insight into Sempra's investment future.

feed.title: Southern Tops FORTUNE Rankings As Investments And Dividend Plans Weighed
feed.summary: Southern Company (NYSE:SO) has been ranked No. 1 in FORTUNE's 2026 World's Most Admired Companies list for electric and gas utilities. The company's recent share price was $89.15, with significant returns over the past one and five years, indicating strong performance. Southern plans considerable capital investment and aims for long-term dividend stability, which will be key for investors assessing risk, income, and growth potential.

feed.title: Chubb Cyber Push And New Investor Interest Highlight Valuation Debate
feed.summary: Chubb has appointed Jimaan Sane as head of growth for its global cyber business, indicating a strategic focus on cyber insurance. Wedgewood Partners has also initiated a new position in Chubb, highlighting fresh institutional interest. These developments suggest an increasing market focus on Chubb's role in cyber risk transfer and management's organizational alignment with this opportunity.

feed.title: Crown Castle Announces Tax Reporting Information for 2025 Distributions
feed.summary: Crown Castle Inc. (NYSE: CCI) has released tax reporting information for its 2025 distributions, specifying ordinary taxable dividends, qualified taxable dividends, Section 199A dividends, and non-taxable distributions on a per-share basis. The company recommends stockholders consult their tax advisors for personalized guidance. Crown Castle operates approximately 40,000 cell towers and 90,000 route miles of fiber across the U.S.

feed.title: Assessing Bank of New York Mellon Corporation (BK) Valuation After Record Q4 Results and Digital Progress
feed.summary: Bank of New York Mellon Corporation (BK) recently reported strong Q4 earnings, highlighting record sales and advancements in digital assets and AI. Despite a slight recent dip, the stock shows strong long-term momentum. While its P/E ratio of 15.5x suggests undervaluation compared to industry benchmarks, a discounted cash flow (DCF) model indicates it might be slightly overvalued, presenting conflicting valuation signals for investors.

feed.title: Eaton evaluating separating its $5B vehicle unit - Bloomberg
feed.summary: Eaton Corp. is reportedly exploring options for its vehicle division, which generates around $5 billion in annual revenue. The company is considering a sale or spin-off of the unit, which produces transmissions, clutches, and other components for commercial vehicles. This move would allow Eaton to focus on its higher-growth electrical and industrial segments.

feed.title: UTime Ltd schedules extraordinary general meeting for January 26
feed.summary: UTime Ltd has announced an extraordinary general meeting for shareholders on January 26, 2026, at 10:00 AM EST. The meeting will include holders of both Class A and Class B ordinary shares. The specific agenda items for the meeting have not been disclosed yet.

feed.title: Cynthia Tregillis Sells 447 Shares of Western Digital (NASDAQ:WDC) Stock
feed.summary: Cynthia Tregillis, an insider at Western Digital (NASDAQ:WDC), sold 447 shares of the company's stock for $102,363, reducing her ownership by 0.31%. This sale occurred on January 21st, the same day WDC stock surged 8.5% to $241.90, driven by analyst upgrades and institutional investment in AI/data-center storage. The company recently reported an EPS beat, increased revenue, and raised its quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley expected to ink downtown Dallas office lease, eyes new Uptown tower
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley is set to sign a temporary 120,000-square-foot lease at Dallas' Fountain Place skyscraper, while considering a significant North Texas expansion of up to half a million square feet. The firm is weighing options to consolidate its D-FW operations in a new Uptown tower at 2401 McKinney Ave., potentially as the lead tenant, or splitting its presence with Collin County. This move would dramatically increase Morgan Stanley's current D-FW office footprint and represents a significant win for downtown Dallas, especially after AT&T's announced move to Plano.

feed.title: The Goldman Sachs Group (NYSE:GS) Director Sells $43,439,850.00 in Stock
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs Director David Viniar sold 45,000 shares of company stock on January 16th for over $43.4 million, reducing his stake by 7.5%. This insider sale follows the company's strong fourth-quarter earnings report, which exceeded analyst expectations, and strategic announcements including an increased dividend, exiting the Apple Card partnership, and a $25 billion investment collaboration with the Qatar Investment Authority. The stock's current trading activity and analyst ratings are also reviewed.

feed.title: Evercore ISI Raises IBM Price Target to $330, Adds Stock to Tactical Outperform List
feed.summary: Evercore ISI analyst Amit Daryanani has increased the price target for International Business Machines Corporation (NYSE: IBM) to $330 from $315, maintaining an Outperform rating. IBM has also been added to Evercore ISI's "Tactical Outperform list" ahead of its upcoming Q4 quarterly results, with expectations of in-line to slightly better performance driven by Infrastructure and Consulting strength. The firm anticipates margin expansion and EPS upside in Q4 due to ongoing cost-saving initiatives and expects IBM to provide formal guidance for CY26, targeting mid-single-digit growth and around $15 billion in free cash flow.

feed.title: Rio Tinto shares jump as copper beats guidance, iron ore rebounds
feed.summary: Rio Tinto's shares rose over 4% after the miner exceeded its copper production guidance for 2025 and reported stronger-than-expected iron ore shipments in Q4, easing concerns about operational disruptions. The company's annual copper output reached 883,000 tonnes, surpassing its guidance, while Pilbara iron ore shipments hit a record 91.3 million tonnes in the fourth quarter. These results were bolstered by the completion of the Oyu Tolgoi underground mine and recovery from earlier cyclone-related iron ore losses.

feed.title: Toll Brothers Named #1 Home Builder on Fortune Magazine’s 2026 World’s Most Admired Companies® List
feed.summary: Toll Brothers has been recognized as the #1 Home Builder on Fortune magazine's 2026 World's Most Admired Companies list for the ninth time. This acknowledgment highlights the company's commitment to excellence and innovation over nearly 60 years. The honor is based on a survey of executives, directors, and analysts evaluating various criteria like investment value, quality of management, and social responsibility.

feed.title: Cintas proposes $5.2 billion bid to buy rival company
feed.summary: The article states that Cintas has proposed a $5.2 billion bid to acquire a rival company. No further details are available regarding the target company or the specifics of the bid.

feed.title: News | Prologis posts record leasing year as US warehouse demand rebounds
feed.summary: Prologis, a global industrial developer and landlord, reported a record year for leasing in 2025, signing 228 million square feet of warehouse leases and reaching nearly 95% occupancy, driven by a rebound in U.S. warehouse demand. The company also announced plans to expand its data center development, with data centers expected to constitute 40% of its planned $4 billion to $5 billion in development starts for the year. This growth is attributed to improved customer sentiment and strong demand in key markets like Southern California.

feed.title: Jeffrey Bluestone Sells 5,000 Shares of Gilead Sciences (NASDAQ:GILD) Stock
feed.summary: Jeffrey Bluestone, a director at Gilead Sciences (NASDAQ:GILD), sold 5,000 shares of the company's stock on January 20th for a total of $617,500. This transaction reduced his holding by 35.92% to 8,920 shares. The biopharmaceutical company also recorded a 4.0% increase in stock price on Wednesday, reaching $129.11, and reported strong earnings in October, surpassing analyst estimates.

feed.title: STB rules application for Union Pacific and Norfolk Southern merger is incomplete
feed.summary: The Surface Transportation Board (STB) has declared the merger application for Union Pacific and Norfolk Southern incomplete. This decision potentially delays the proposed consolidation of the two major railway companies. The article, published in Biodiesel Magazine, did not provide details on why the application was deemed incomplete.

feed.title: CVS Health’s fraud-policing ‘pretextual,’ anticompetitive, US House report says
feed.summary: A US House Judiciary Committee interim staff report alleges that CVS Health's "pretextual fraud allegations" for business practice changes are anticompetitive and stifle innovation in digital pharmacy services. The report suggests these practices are unlikely to withstand court scrutiny. MLex identifies these types of regulatory risks and provides analysis for legal and business professionals.

feed.title: Intuitive Surgical's da Vinci 5 Approval Boosts Long-Term Outlook
feed.summary: Intuitive Surgical's da Vinci 5 system, approved in 2024, is expected to enhance market penetration and revenue growth over the next five years, despite increased competition from Medtronic. The company benefits from high switching costs due to its established installed base, and analysts project a significant stock price increase. The robotic surgery market remains underpenetrated, offering further growth opportunities for Intuitive Surgical alongside its competitors.

feed.title: Saul Centers, Inc. Announces Tax Treatment of 2025 Dividends
feed.summary: Saul Centers, Inc., an equity REIT, has announced the income tax treatment for its 2025 dividends. For common stock shareholders, 26.3% of the dividends are characterized as ordinary income and 73.7% as return of capital, totaling $2.36 per common share. All preferred stock dividends for 2025 are characterized as ordinary income.

feed.title: Pinnacle Financial Partners (NYSE:PNFP) Reports Strong Earnings Growth but Misses Revenue Estimates
feed.summary: Pinnacle Financial Partners (NYSE:PNFP) announced strong fourth-quarter 2025 earnings growth, with adjusted diluted EPS increasing by 17.9% year-over-year, ultimately leading to a slight miss against analyst estimates. Despite missing revenue estimates, the company reported significant balance sheet growth, improved net interest margin, and strong fee income. The report highlighted the recent completion of its merger with Synovus Financial Corp., positioning the combined entity for future success.

feed.title: Brown & Brown (BRO) Maintains Quarterly Dividend at $0.165 Per S
feed.summary: Brown & Brown (BRO) has announced it will maintain its quarterly dividend at $0.165 per share, resulting in a forward yield of 0.85%. This decision comes as the company continues strategic expansion through acquisitions, such as the J. Kevin Campbell Agency assets, despite a recent rating adjustment to Market Perform by BMO due to anticipated softer organic growth. The diversified insurance provider shows robust financial performance with strong margins and revenue growth, though its Altman Z-Score suggests potential financial distress, warranting careful consideration by investors.

feed.title: Why Is TMC Stock Rallying Today?
feed.summary: The Metals Company (TMC) stock rallied after the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration (NOAA) updated regulations for deep-sea explorations, streamlining the permitting process for U.S. companies. TMC announced its intention to use the new consolidated application process, which is expected to reduce the time needed to secure commercial recovery permits. This regulatory change is seen as a significant modernization that could accelerate the development of critical mineral resources from the deep seabed.

feed.title: Kimco Realty Corporation Announces 2025 Dividend Tax Treatment
feed.summary: Kimco Realty Corporation has announced the tax treatment for its common stock and preferred stock dividend distributions for 2025. The company, a real estate investment trust (REIT), provided detailed allocations as they will be reported on Form 1099-DIV for both common shares and Preferred Series L and M. These details include the ex-dividend date, record date, payable date, and the breakdown of distributions into ordinary income, capital gains, and return of capital components.

feed.title: Atlantic Union Bankshares (NASDAQ:AUB) Sets New 1-Year High - Here's Why
feed.summary: Atlantic Union Bankshares (NASDAQ:AUB) reached a new 52-week high of $39.29, closing trading at $39.4240 on heavy volume. Despite a slight EPS miss last quarter, the company reported 69.8% year-over-year revenue growth and increased its quarterly dividend. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average price target of $41.61, while institutional investors have significantly increased their stakes.

feed.title: Teledyne Technologies Inc (TDY) Q4 2026 Earnings Call Highlights: Strong Growth in Digital ...
feed.summary: Teledyne Technologies (TDY) reported strong Q4 2026 results with significant growth in its Digital Imaging (3.4%) and Aerospace and Defense Electronics (40.4%) segments, driven by Teledyne FLIR sales and acquisitions. The company also achieved record free cash flow of $339.2 million. However, the Engineered System segment saw a decline in revenue, and X-ray detectors and scientific cameras sales were lower.

feed.title: Price-Driven Insight from (AEFC) for Rule-Based Strategy
feed.summary: This article provides a price-driven insight for Aegon Funding Company Llc (NASDAQ: AEFC), highlighting a full alignment in neutral sentiment that favors a wait-and-see approach. It details exceptional risk-reward short setup and offers three institutional trading strategies tailored to different risk profiles. The analysis includes multi-timeframe signal analysis and AI-generated signals for informed decision-making.

feed.title: Pinnacle and Synovus Merger Completed, 2025 Net Income Reaches $746.7 Million
feed.summary: The merger between Pinnacle Financial Partners and Synovus was finalized on January 1, 2026, aiming to foster growth and improve client experience. Both companies showed strong pre-merger performance in 2025, with significant increases in EPS, loan and deposit growth, and non-interest revenue. Wall Street analysts maintain a generally positive outlook for Pinnacle Financial (PNFP) stock, with several firms initiating or raising price targets following the merger news.

feed.title: Southern Missouri Bancorp: Fiscal Q2 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Southern Missouri Bancorp (SMBC) reported a profit of $18.1 million in its fiscal second quarter, translating to $1.62 per share. The bank holding company also announced revenue of $79 million, with an adjusted revenue of $49.6 million for the period.

feed.title: SOUTHERN MISSOURI BANCORP REPORTS PRELIMINARY RESULTS FOR SECOND QUARTER OF FISCAL 2026; DECLARES QUARTERLY DIVIDEND OF $0.25 PER COMMON SHARE; CONFERENCE CALL SCHEDULED FOR THURSDAY, JANUARY
feed.summary: Southern Missouri Bancorp, Inc. announced preliminary net income of $18.2 million for the second quarter of fiscal 2026, marking a 23.9% increase year-over-year, with diluted earnings per common share at $1.62. The company also declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.25 per common share and authorized a new share repurchase program for up to 5% of outstanding common shares. Highlights include an increased net interest margin of 3.57%, growth in gross loan balances, and a tangible book value per share of $44.65.

feed.title: Brown & Brown declares quarterly cash dividend of $0.165 per share
feed.summary: Brown & Brown, Inc. (NYSE:BRO) has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.165 per share, payable on February 11, 2026, to shareholders of record on February 4, 2026. The insurance brokerage firm has a 40-year history of consistent dividend payments and observed a 26.92% dividend growth over the last year. The announcement follows recent analyst coverage with varied ratings and price targets, acknowledging the company's strong market position and recent acquisition activities.

feed.title: Ally Financial originations rise 4.9%
feed.summary: Ally Financial's auto originations increased by 4.9% year-over-year in the fourth quarter to $10.8 billion, driven by improved credit performance and underwriting adjustments. Despite the annual rise, originations were down 7.7% quarter-over-quarter. The volume of auto finance applications also saw an 8.6% increase year-over-year, alongside a retail auto originated yield of 9.6%.

feed.title: Documents & Charters
feed.summary: This page from Fiserv, Inc. outlines the company's corporate governance documents and charters. It details the duties of the Board of Directors in upholding high standards, serving as fiduciaries for shareholders, and overseeing management, subject to periodic modifications. Key documents like Governance Guidelines, Committee Charters, Code of Conduct, and political contribution reports are listed.

feed.title: Company Profile
feed.summary: Fiserv, Inc. (NASDAQ: FISV) is a Fortune 500 company and a global leader in payments and financial technology. The company offers a wide range of services including account processing, digital banking, card services, payments, e-commerce, and the Clover point-of-sale system. Fiserv is recognized as a member of the S&P 500 Index and one of Fortune's World's Most Admired Companies.

feed.title: Ratios
feed.summary: This article provides a comprehensive overview of Fiserv, Inc.'s financial ratios, covering valuation, profitability, efficiency, per-share data, growth, financial strength, and management effectiveness. It details key metrics such as P/E ratios, operating margins, revenue per share, and return on equity, presenting data for trailing twelve months (TTM), most recent quarter (MRQ), and fiscal year (FY).

feed.title: 0000798354-25-000171 | 10-Q
feed.summary: This article provides details about Fiserv, Inc.'s 10-Q SEC filing. The filing, dated October 30, 2025, covers the company's financial position up to September 30, 2025. It includes links to various formats of the document, including iXBRL, HTML, PDF, DOC, XLS, and XBRL files.

feed.title: The Best Dividend Stocks to Buy and Hold Forever
feed.summary: This article identifies Coca-Cola, Realty Income, and Walmart as top dividend stocks suitable for long-term investors due to their consistent dividend growth and strong business models. Coca-Cola and Walmart are Dividend Kings with decades of annual increases, while Realty Income provides a stable monthly dividend from its extensive real estate portfolio. The author emphasizes diversification with such stable value and dividend stocks to protect portfolios during market volatility.

feed.title: Range Resources Corp expects to report total gain on derivatives of $32.8 million for three months ended December 31, 2025
feed.summary: Range Resources Corp anticipates reporting a total gain on derivatives of $32.8 million for the three-month period ending December 31, 2025. This financial expectation was published on MarketScreener. The company's stock, RRC, closed at $36.24 USD with a 3.81% increase for the day.

feed.title: Camden Property Trust Announces Tax Characteristics of 2025 Distributions
feed.summary: Camden Property Trust has released the income tax characteristics for its 2025 distributions paid to shareholders, which will be reported on Form 1099-DIV. This information is intended to assist banks, brokerage firms, and institutional investors in issuing accurate 1099 forms. The announcement details the record dates, payment dates, total distribution per share, and classification of dividends including ordinary taxable, qualified, long-term capital gain, and Section 199A dividends.

feed.title: How Truist’s Upgrade and Mixed Analyst Views Will Impact UDR (UDR) Investors
feed.summary: Truist Securities upgraded UDR's rating from Hold to Buy, signaling increased analyst confidence in the apartment REIT despite mixed overall Wall Street opinions. This upgrade, mirroring UBS's positive outlook, could influence sentiment and trading liquidity for UDR. Investors are encouraged to consider diverse perspectives, including UDR's debt profile and current valuation, as the company's investment narrative centers on durable earnings and a reliable income stream rather than rapid growth.

feed.title: Camden Property Trust Announces Tax Characteristics of 2025 Distributions
feed.summary: Camden Property Trust (NYSE: CPT) has released the income tax characteristics for its 2025 distributions paid to shareholders, aiding banks and brokerage firms in issuing Form 1099-DIV. The announcement details the breakdown of ordinary taxable dividends, qualified dividends, long-term capital gain, and other specific gains across four payment dates in 2025. The company advises shareholders to consult their own tax advisors due to varying federal and state tax laws.

feed.title: Police investigating $15,000 Home Depot theft in Dickson City
feed.summary: Police in Lackawanna County are investigating a retail theft at a Home Depot in Dickson City involving over $15,000 worth of merchandise, which they believe is connected to a similar incident at a Stroudsburg Home Depot. Authorities are asking the public for assistance in identifying and locating the suspect, as retail theft cases of this magnitude often involve organized crime.
